zh.Roxbury, Massachusetts Bay, British Colo: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼洛波利
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Denison於1572年2月3日在英國賀特福爾比曉普也斯 斯托特福德受洗時，他的父親John Denison37歲，母親Agnes Wiley38歲。他於1603年11月7日與Margaret Chandler在英國賀特福爾比曉普也斯 斯托特福德結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1631年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼洛波利並在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼洛波利住了大約5年。他去世於1654年1月25日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可洛波利享年81歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州素福爾可洛波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Denison于1572年2月3日在英国賀特福爾比曉普也斯 斯托特福德受洗时，他的父亲John Denison37岁，母亲Agnes Wiley38岁。他于1603年11月7日与Margaret Chandler在英国賀特福爾比曉普也斯 斯托特福德结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1631年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼洛波利并在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼洛波利住了大约5年。他去世于1654年1月25日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可洛波利享年81岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州素福爾可洛波利。

nameMeanings.name: Denison
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of a Slavic patronymic from the personal name Denis or Denys , such as Russian Denisov or Ukrainian Denysenko or Denysevych.

variants.name: Dennison
meanings: English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name Denis (see Dennis ) + -son. Compare Tennyson .
English (of Norman origin): from Anglo-Norman French deinzein, a burgess who enjoyed the privileges of those living deinz la cité ‘within the city’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When William Denison was christened on 3 February 1572, in Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England, his father, John Denison, was 37 and his mother, Agnes Wiley, was 38. He married Margaret Chandler on 7 November 1603, in Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. He immigrated to Roxbury, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1631 and lived in Roxbury, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America for about 5 years. He died on 25 January 1654, in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 81, and was buried in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Denison a été baptisé le 3 février 1572, à Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, son père, John Denison, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Agnes Wiley, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Chandler le 7 novembre 1603, à Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Il a immigré au Roxbury, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1631 et a vécu à Roxbury, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique pendant environ 5 ans. Il est décédé le 25 janvier 1654, à Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterré à Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Denison am 3. Februar 1572 in Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England getauft wurde, war sein Vater John Denison 37 und seine Mutter Agnes Wiley 38. Er hat am 7. November 1603 in Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England Margaret Chandler geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er ist 1631 nach Roxbury, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America eingewandert. Er hat ungefähr 5 Jahre lang in Roxbury, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America gelebt. Er starb am 25. Januar 1654 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Denison è stato battezzato il 3 febbraio 1572 nel Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England, il suo padre, John Denison, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Wiley, aveva 38 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Chandler il 7 novembre 1603, nel Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Immigrato nel Roxbury, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America nel 1631 e vissuto a Roxbury, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America per circa 5 anni. Morì il 25 gennaio 1654, nel Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 81 anni, e fu sepolto a Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: William Denisonが1572年2月3日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアビショプ'ス ストルトフォードで洗礼を受けた時，父John Denisonは37歳，母Agnes Wileyは38歳であった。1603年11月7日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアビショプ'ス ストルトフォードでMargaret Chandlerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1631年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーロクスブリーに移住し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーロクスブリーに約5年間住んでいた。彼は1654年1月25日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクロクスブリーで81歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州スフォルクロクスブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Denison(이)가 1572년 2월 3일 영국 허트퍼드실르 비숍'스 스토르트퍼드에서 침례를 받았을 때, 그의 아버지 John Denison(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Wiley(은)는 38세였다. 그는 1603년 11월 7일 영국 허트퍼드실르 비숍'스 스토르트퍼드에서 Margaret Chandler(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1631년에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 록스버이로 이민을 떠났고, 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 록스버이에서 약 5년 동안 살았다. 그는 1654년 1월 25일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 록스버이에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 수폴크 록스버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Denison foi batizado em 3 de fevereiro de 1572, em Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Denison, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Wiley, tinha 38 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Chandler em 7 de novembro de 1603, em Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ele imigrou para o Roxbury, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America em 1631 e viveu em Roxbury, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America por quase 5 anos. Ele faleceu em 25 de janeiro de 1654, em Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 81 anos, e foi sepultado em Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Denison был крещен 3 февраля 1572 г. в местности бишоп'с стортфорд, хиртфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Denison было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Wiley, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Chandler 7 ноября 1603 г. в местности бишоп'с стортфорд, хиртфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он иммигрировал в роксбури, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1631 году, а также жил в местности роксбури, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика около 5 лет. Он умер 25 января 1654 г. в местности роксбури, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 81 год и был похоронен в местности роксбури, суффолк, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Denison se bautizó el 3 de febrero de 1572, en Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Denison, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Agnes Wiley, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Margaret Chandler el 7 de noviembre de 1603, en Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Inmigró a Roxbury, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America en 1631 y vivió en Roxbury, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America durante unos 5 años. Murió el 25 de enero de 1654, en Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 81 años, y fue sepultado en Roxbury, Suffolk, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
